message:
bd-z2pbq: Implement HeatmapWidget for dashboard

- Create HeatmapWidget with canvas-based rendering
- Support configurable color scales (min/max hex colors)
- Add column/row labels, value display option, legend
- Export from widgets/index.ts and integrate in WidgetRenderer
- Remove TODO placeholder, connect to widget type "heatmap"

Data shape:
{
  rows: [{ label, cells: [{ value, label? }] }],
  columnLabels?: string[],
  colorScale?: { min, max },
  showValues?: boolean
}

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
